title: Create cloud native apps with Azure and open-source software
summary: Cloud-native apps represent a modern approach to app development, where software systems are designed with cloud scale and capabilities in mind. Cloud-native apps build on open source technologies where feasible, with a focus on architectural modularity.

sections.title: Create cloud native apps with Azure and open-source software
sections.summary: Cloud-native apps represent a modern approach to app development, where software systems are designed with cloud scale and capabilities in mind. Cloud-native apps build on open source technologies where feasible, with a focus on architectural modularity.

lessons.title: Introduction to cloud-native apps on Azure
lessons.content_md:
This module teaches concepts and ideas associated with cloud-native apps. We cover selecting Open-Source Software (OSS) components like Kubernetes and PostgreSQL, and unique Azure tools like Cosmos DB. We also identify situations that call for building cloud-native apps, and review selecting components in an example scenario.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-cloud-native-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to cloud-native apps on Azure

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Create cloud native apps with Azure and open-source software
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Create cloud native apps with Azure and open-source software**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
